title: Modder runs GTA III inside GTA: San Andreas on an in-game TV
excerpt: GTA III can now run on a television texture inside GTA: San Andreas. The game renders directly to the TV’s GPU texture without capture or streaming.
content_html:
Published: Jul 18, 2026, 11:54 GMT WhyCry

GTA III becomes a playable TV game inside GTA: San Andreas

GTA modder Dryxio has demonstrated GTA III running on a television inside GTA: San Andreas. The video shows CJ standing in front of the screen while GTA III remains fully playable.

This is not a recording or a captured window mapped onto the television. According to Dryxio, GTA III runs inside the GTA: San Andreas process, with both games sharing the same Direct3D device. GTA III renders directly into the television’s live GPU texture. 

The player can switch between controlling CJ in San Andreas and Claude in GTA III. The San Andreas world remains active while GTA III is running on the screen, rather than pausing or replacing the main game with a full-screen interface.

DryxioGTA: gta III running in a gta sa texture 21,271 views

The demonstration builds on Dryxio’s earlier mod that ports GTA III and GTA: Vice City into GTA: San Andreas. That version was released in February 2026 and runs each game as an independent engine inside the San Andreas process, with separate story progress, saves, settings and gameplay. 

The public package does not include files from GTA III or GTA: Vice City. Players must own both games and provide the required assets.

Source: Dryxio

Dryxio has since taken the experiment another step further. A second demonstration shows GTA: Vice City running on a texture inside GTA III, which is itself running on a television inside GTA: San Andreas.

Source: GTA3/VC Mod

content_html_zh:
发布时间： 2026 年 7 月 18 日，11:54 GMT WhyCry

GTA III 成为 GTA: San Andreas 中的一款可玩电视游戏

GTA 改装者 Dryxio 已在 GTA：圣安地列斯中的电视上演示了 GTA III 的运行情况。 视频显示 CJ 站在屏幕前，而 GTA III 仍然完全可以玩。

这不是映射到电视上的录音或捕获的窗口。 根据 Dryxio 的说法，GTA III 在 GTA: San Andreas 进程内运行，两个游戏共享相同的 Direct3D 设备。 GTA III 直接渲染到电视的实时 GPU 纹理中。

玩家可以在圣安地列斯中控制CJ和GTA III中控制克劳德之间切换。 当《GTA III》在屏幕上运行时，圣安地列斯世界仍然活跃，而不是暂停或用全屏界面替换主游戏。

DryxioGTA：gta III 在 gta sa 纹理中运行 21,271 次观看

该演示建立在 Dryxio 早期模组的基础上，该模组将《侠盗猎车手 III》和《侠盗猎车手：罪恶都市》移植到《侠盗猎车手：圣安地列斯》中。 该版本于 2026 年 2 月发布，每个游戏都作为圣安地列斯进程中的独立引擎运行，具有单独的故事进度、保存、设置和游戏玩法。

公共包不包含《GTA III》或《GTA：罪恶都市》中的文件。 玩家必须拥有这两款游戏并提供所需的资产。

来源：Dryxio

此后，Dryxio 将实验又向前推进了一步。 第二个演示显示《GTA：罪恶都市》在《GTA III》中的纹理上运行，而该纹理本身也在《GTA：圣安地列斯》中的电视上运行。

来源：GTA3/VC 模组
